content.problemStatement:
You are given binary strings SSS and TTT, each of length NNN, and an integer KKK.

Find whether it is possible to convert string SSS to TTT by making **exactly** KKK operations of the following type:


Choose **distinct** indices iii and j (1≤i,j≤N)j \ (1\le i, j \le N)j (1≤i,j≤N);
Swap SiS_iSi​ with SjS_jSj​.

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer T′T'T′, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK — the length of the string and the number of operations, respectively.
The second line contains the binary string SSS of length NNN.
The third line contains the binary string TTT of length NNN.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, `YES`, if it is possible to convert string SSS to TTT by making **exactly** KKK operations. Otherwise, output `NO`.


You may print each character of the string in uppercase or lowercase (for example, the strings `YES`, `yEs`, `yes`, and `yeS` will all be treated as identical).
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2⋅1052\cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: The only operation we can perform on SSS is swapping S1S_1S1​ and S2S_2S2​. Thus, performing 222 operations would convert SSS as 01→10→0101 \rightarrow 10 \rightarrow 0101→10→01, which is not equal to TTT.
Test case 222: It is not possible to convert SSS to TTT using any number of operations.
Test case 333: We can convert string S=001S = 001S=001 to T=010T = 010T=010 using K=1K = 1K=1 operation:

Select indices i=2i = 2i=2 and j=3j = 3j=3 and swap S2S_2S2​ and S3S_3S3​.

Test case 444: We can convert string S=1101S = 1101S=1101 to T=0111T = 0111T=0111 using K=2K = 2K=2 operations:

Select indices i=3i = 3i=3 and j=4j = 4j=4 and swap S3S_3S3​ and S4S_4S4​ to obtain 111011101110.
Select indices i=1i = 1i=1 and j=4j = 4j=4 and swap S1S_1S1​ and S4S_4S4​ to obtain 011101110111, which is same as TTT.
